examples: The deal gives the athletic clothing maker exclusivity in the footwear and apparel categories at Tough Mudder events.
The partnership with Tough Mudder, which holds endurance races over obstacle courses, represents the first endurance event sponsorship for Under Armour.
Tough Mudder, founded in 2010, plans to run 35 events world-wide in 2012 and projects 500, 000 participants, up from 140, 000 in 2011.
